meta.note: Replace this file with a real feed from https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/vulnerabilities or a Cloudflare Worker proxy.

threats.title: Critical RCE in OpenSSH
threats.description: Unauthenticated remote code execution via crafted SSH packets. Grants root-level access on vulnerable hosts.

threats.title: SQL Injection in Popular CMS
threats.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection on the user login endpoint allows full database extraction.

threats.title: Reflected XSS in jQuery UI
threats.description: Reflected XSS via unsanitised search parameter allows attackers to inject and execute malicious scripts in a victim's browser.

threats.title: TLS 1.0 Downgrade Attack
threats.description: Legacy TLS 1.0 protocol support enables downgrade attacks. Upgrading to TLS 1.3 is strongly recommended.
